title: Hug Your Haters
author: Jay Baer
subtopics: customer service, complaints, business, online reviews
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- Two speech bubbles facing each other: one HUGS the other. The hugged bubble is RED (the complaint turned to feedback). -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1500)" fill="none" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="2">
    <!-- Left bubble = the HUGGER (brand) -->
    <path d="M -460 -200 Q -460 -340 -320 -340 L 20 -340 Q 160 -340 160 -200 L 160 -40 Q 160 100 20 100 L -180 100 L -260 180 L -240 100 L -320 100 Q -460 100 -460 -40 Z"/>
    <!-- right bubble = the HATED (complaint) — RED stroke + filled with red -->
    <g transform="translate(560 0)">
      <path d="M -340 -180 Q -340 -300 -200 -300 L 160 -300 Q 300 -300 300 -180 L 300 -20 Q 300 100 160 100 L 60 100 L 140 180 L 20 100 L -200 100 Q -340 100 -340 -20 Z" fill="#fc1c46" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="2"/>
    </g>
    <!-- HUG arcs: the brand's two arms wrapping the red bubble -->
    <path d="M -260 -200 Q 60 -360 360 -180" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="3"/>
    <path d="M -260 60 Q 60 -120 360 60" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="3"/>
    <!-- Small mouth inside the hugger bubble — smiling -->
    <path d="M -220 -60 Q -160 -120 -100 -60" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="2"/>
    <circle cx="-300" cy="-160" r="6" fill="#cccccc"/>
    <circle cx="-140" cy="-160" r="6" fill="#cccccc"/>
    <!-- angry mouth inside the red bubble -->
    <path d="M 700 -60 Q 760 0 820 -60" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="2"/>
    <circle cx="640" cy="-160" r="6" fill="#ffffff"/>
    <circle cx="800" cy="-160" r="6" fill="#ffffff"/>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: Two opposing speech bubbles — the brand and the hater — face each other in the lower 2/3. The hater's bubble is filled RED (the only chromatic element). Red hug-arcs wrap the red bubble, making the metaphor literal: a hostile message embraced. Big 360px uppercase title dominates the top.
